literal_description: A 3D-rendered astronaut in a white spacesuit with red accent bands plays a gold alto saxophone against a plain white background.

metaphor: technical expert in a human role

use_cases: Illustrating an underwriter who applies rigid technical criteria to an inherently human decision like homeownership
Opening screen for a module on 'knowing the rules but not the context' — when expertise alone isn't enough
Visual metaphor for a loan officer operating in an unfamiliar market or product type for the first time
Representing the experience of explaining complex mortgage disclosures through a medium the borrower wasn't expecting
Header image for a section on how regulators and compliance officers can feel disconnected from borrower reality
Pairing with content about performing a scripted process — like a closing — that still requires human finesse
Anchoring a quiz question about which professional role requires both technical precision and clear communication
avoid_for: Content requiring visible warmth or emotional empathy, such as first-time homebuyer milestone moments
Fraud or predatory lending modules where menace or deception must read clearly
Sections celebrating community or family legacy in homeownership
Any context where the character's face or identity needs to be legible to build trust

literal_description: A tattooed biker in a leather vest and bandana sits at a desk chair reviewing a stock portfolio dashboard on a desktop monitor showing $42,583 in holdings with diversification across tech, finance, health, and energy sectors.
primary_action: analyzing a multi-stock investment portfolio on a desktop computer

metaphor: don't judge a book by its cover

use_cases: Illustrating why lenders cannot assess creditworthiness by appearance alone during fair lending compliance modules
Opening a lesson on non-traditional borrowers who hold substantial liquid assets despite unconventional backgrounds
Depicting a borrower whose asset diversification complicates DTI calculations in underwriting scenarios
Anchoring a discussion on why self-employed or gig-economy applicants require deeper financial document review
Representing the concept that portfolio wealth does not automatically translate to mortgage eligibility
Visualizing risk perception bias in a module on predatory lending targeting non-mainstream demographics
Setting the scene for a case study where an applicant's financial profile surprises a loan officer during pre-qualification
avoid_for: First-time homebuyer empathy modules where approachability and vulnerability are the intended emotional register
Compliance or regulatory authority contexts requiring institutional credibility signals
Conservative lending institution branding where counterculture aesthetics would undermine trust
Senior borrower or reverse mortgage content where demographic alignment is critical

primary_subject: burglar dressed in classic cartoon-thief attire wearing a medieval knight helmet
primary_action: sneaking while carrying a swag bag

Accompanying a case study on straw buyer schemes where the real actor hides behind a front
Intro slide for a compliance section on why robust disclosure requirements exist
avoid_for: Any module celebrating borrower empowerment or first-time homebuyer success

Sections on legitimate asset protection or estate planning strategies
Diversity and inclusion focused onboarding materials

Illustrating the paradox of over-documented files that still conceal material misrepresentation
